add.description: Intelligent ecosystem gateway - answers questions, guides flow, suggests next command

add.xray.description: Architecture discovery and mapping - classifies apps, dispatches analyzer agents, consolidates reports

add.audit.description: Complete technical project audit with health analysis and recommendations

add.autopilot.description: Autonomous feature coordinator - executes planning, development, and review without interaction

add.brainstorm.description: Project conversation partner for exploring ideas (READ-ONLY)

add.copy.description: Generate structured copy for SaaS landing pages using saas-copy frameworks

add.design.description: UX specialist for SaaS - autonomous mobile-first design with screen flows and component specs

add.build.description: Development execution specialist - coordinates subagents for feature implementation and bug fixes

add.done.description: Branch completion and merge - finalize feature/hotfix branches with changelog and documentation

add.new.description: Full feature discovery and documentation - creates about.md before implementation

add.hotfix.description: Rapid bug fix workflow with dual mode - urgent production fixes

add.init.description: Project onboarding - collect founder profile and generate product blueprint

add.landing.description: Landing page builder - production-ready SaaS landing pages

add.plan.description: Technical planning orchestrator - creates plan.md with epic vs feature detection

add.pr.description: Feature PR and changelog generator with automatic documentation

add.review.description: Feature code review specialist with auto-correction until 100% correct

add.test.description: Automated test generation targeting 80% coverage — detects framework, runs startup test, dispatches parallel area agents

add.ux.description: Lightweight UX refinement - loads ux-design skill and applies to free-form instructions
